# Coefficients generated for the comparison operation

- For generating optimal degrees we use the implementation at github.com/eslee3209/MinimaxComp_degrees
- For generating the actual coeffs, we use Lattigo

## Generating degrees for composite polynomial

Parameters:
- alpha: 16
- max_factor=1
- maxdeg: 63
- is_comp = true
- level = 22 (irrelevant)

Generated degrees:

depth: 20
minmult: 39
0.55259196997974898984e-4
degs: 7 15 15 15 27 

depth: 21
minmult: 42
0.28051626978853877543e-4
degs: 15 15 15 15 27

## Generating coefficients

minimax.GenMinimaxCompositePolynomialForSign(256, 16, 16, []int{15, 15, 15, 15, 27})
